meaning: n.<美口>国际青年商会,国际青年商会(Junior Chamber)会员
examples: Jaycee is a fan of Michael Jackson.
The lead actor, Jackie Chan, and his singer-actor son, Jaycee Chan, were seen in the pictures.
Jackie lives in one with his wife; his son, Jaycee Chan, also an actor and musician, lives in the other.
Over the last 18 years I have often thought about what happened to Jaycee.
Torie Bosch, blogging at DoubleX, speculates about the reasons why Jaycee Dugard did not escape.
